forTutors.faqDescription: Common questions about becoming a tutor

faq1.question: How much can I really earn as a tutor?
faq1.answer: Earnings vary based on your subjects, experience, and hours. Most tutors earn $25-45 per hour, with top tutors earning $50+ per hour for specialized subjects.

faq2.question: What subjects are most in demand?
faq2.answer: STEM subjects (mathematics, statistics, computer science), economics, and business courses typically have the highest demand, but we need tutors across all disciplines.

faq3.question: How many hours can I expect to teach?
faq3.answer: This is entirely up to you. Some tutors teach 5-10 hours weekly, while others teach 20+ hours. You set your own availability and can adjust it anytime.

faq4.question: Do I need previous teaching experience?
faq4.answer: No formal teaching experience is required, but you should be able to explain concepts clearly and have strong knowledge in your subject areas.

howItWorks.faqsDescription: Find answers to common questions about using 11tutors

faqs.question1: How do I get started with 11tutors?
faqs.answer1: Simply create an account, browse our courses or tutors, and book your first session. It's that easy!
faqs.answer2: We offer tutoring in mathematics, sciences, languages, business, and many other university-level subjects.
faqs.answer3: Pricing varies by tutor and subject, typically ranging from $25-60 per hour. You can see exact rates before booking.
faqs.question4: Can I cancel or reschedule sessions?
faqs.answer4: Yes, you can cancel or reschedule sessions up to 24 hours in advance without any penalty.
faqs.answer5: Yes, if you're not satisfied with your first session, we offer a full refund within 48 hours.

howItWorks.moreQuestions: Have more questions? We're here to help!
